task_completion.description: Create a Title Block with the band name and contact info
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text box or distinct section in the diagram containing the band name 'Neon Velvet' and some form of contact information.

task_completion.description: Include required elements in the Stage Plot
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visual representations (icons, shapes, or labeled boxes) for drums, bass amp, vocal mics, monitor wedges, and power drops on the stage plot.

task_completion.description: Position elements correctly according to stage directions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify the spatial arrangement: Drums should be near the top (Upstage), Vocals near the bottom (Downstage), Keys on the left side (Stage Right / Audience Left), and Guitar on the right side (Stage Left / Audience Right).

task_completion.description: Create an Input List table with required columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table structure containing columns explicitly named for 'Channel Number', 'Instrument', and 'Microphone/Input Type', populated with audio inputs.
Look at the Draw.io application window title bar, a save dialog, or a file manager to confirm the file is named 'neon_velvet_rider.drawio' and saved in the ~/Diagrams/ directory.

task_completion.description: Export the final result as a PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a PDF export dialog in Draw.io, a file manager window showing 'neon_velvet_rider.pdf' in the ~/Diagrams/ folder, or a PDF viewer displaying the final document.

integrity.description: The agent used the Draw.io GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the Draw.io (diagrams.net) graphical interface is visible in the screenshots, with toolbars, shape panels, and a canvas being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the stage plot and input list
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent dragging shapes, typing text, and formatting the table within Draw.io, rather than executing a script to generate the .drawio XML file.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to export the PDF
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the PDF was exported using the Draw.io export functionality (e.g., File -> Export as -> PDF) rather than a command-line conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Band Name: Neon Velvet. Stage Layout Rules: Upstage = Top of diagram, Downstage = Bottom of diagram, Stage Right = Left side of diagram (Audience Left), Stage Left = Right side of diagram (Audience Right). Expected Layout: Drums Upstage Center (top center), Lead Vocals Downstage Center (bottom center), Keys Stage Right (left side), Guitar Stage Left (right side). Equipment to look for in the input list: Ampeg SVT, Fender Twin Reverb, Nord Stage 3, Shure Beta 52, SM57, SM58.
